items.title: Efficient storage
items.desc: Stack and store with minimal footprint — designed to keep the room tidy when not in use.

items.title: Fast folding
items.desc: Fold-out mechanism lets a single person set up or pack away in seconds, with no tools required.

items.title: High-strength wheels
items.desc: Heavy-duty castors carry the full load smoothly across hard floors and low-pile carpet, with locking brakes for stability.

items.title: Smart connection
items.desc: Link multiple units together for larger configurations — quick to attach, secure when locked.
